description_long: This house features a prominent red gable roof with deep overhangs and exposed rafters, giving it a classic Craftsman appearance. The exterior walls are divided into two sections: the lower half is clad in dark brown brick, while the upper half is finished in light-colored stucco with vertical wooden trim. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically placed on the front and rear facades, with smaller windows along the sides. A covered porch with wooden railings and steps is located at one end, providing access to the main entryway. The house sits on a paved stone platform bordered by a low retaining wall, suggesting a raised foundation. Architectural details such as decorative gable trim and supporting columns enhance the visual appeal.
description: A Craftsman-style house with a red gable roof, brick and stucco exterior, large windows, and a covered porch with wooden railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with two large windows, decorative gable trim, and the paved entry area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick and stucco wall, deep roof overhang, and absence of windows on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the covered porch, wooden stairs, and open entryway beneath the roof overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying two windows on the lower level, vertical trim, and the continuation of the paved platform.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden railings, steps, and decorative gable trim
